redGreenRefactorEvidence.behavior: Callback exchanges code and returns sanitized completed response

redGreenRefactorEvidence.greenResult: PASS after raising HTTPException in get_tiktok_oauth_service

implementationSummary: Replaced OAuth callback token-exchange stub with real TikTokAuth.exchange_code via asyncio.to_thread; extended callback response with sanitized metadata (open_id_present, access_token_expires_in); mapped config and auth failures to 503/502.
assumptions: App Review slice verifies exchange only — credential persistence remains in TikTokOAuthService
TIKTOK_BASE_URL defaults to https://open-api.tiktokglobalshop.com when unset
risks: Live Partner Center exchange still requires valid review app credentials on VPS
acceptanceCriteria: Callback with valid code calls TikTokAuth.exchange_code
Success response proves exchange completed without leaking tokens
Invalid state returns 401; missing code returns 400
Missing env returns safe configuration error
TikTok auth failures map to sanitized API error
Tests cover success, failure, redaction, and config-missing paths
